concept: Develop a sports game where players compete in a discipline combining architectural construction and obstacle navigation in massive zero-gravity arenas. Teams simultaneously build structures and navigate opponents' constructions, earning points for both creative building and efficient traversal of challenging obstacles. Construction materials have different physical properties - elastic connectors create bounce pathways, frictionless surfaces enable rapid slides, while magnetic elements can attract or repel participants wearing charged equipment. Strategic demolition of opponents' structures is permitted but costs valuable building resources, creating tensions between offensive and defensive priorities. Championship competitions feature inherited arenas containing elements from previous matches, requiring adaptation to increasingly complex architectural environments with each successive round.
